q1.question: How much does inhabitme cost?
q1.answer: $79-239 one-time fee for the tenant based on stay duration. It's a one-time payment, not monthly. No commissions on rent, no hidden percentages. You pay once to get the contact and coordinate everything directly.

q2.question: Why is it so cheap compared to Airbnb?
q2.answer: Because we charge a transparent flat fee ($79-239 based on duration), not percentages on rent. Airbnb charges 14-20% of the total. For 3 months at $1200/month, Airbnb charges $500-720. inhabitme only $139. You save hundreds of dollars. It's a fairer and more transparent model.

q3.question: What exactly do I get for this fee?
q3.answer: Verified direct contact of the host (email + phone) + 48h response guarantee or money back. inhabitme acts as a trusted intermediary. After the match, you communicate directly with the host to coordinate everything.

q4.question: Does the host pay anything?
q4.answer: Yes, the host pays $49-119 when accepting a request (based on stay duration). This ensures commitment from both parties and allows inhabitme to operate sustainably.

q5.question: Is WiFi really verified?
q5.answer: All listings are required to have reliable internet suitable for remote work. Specific speed requirements should be confirmed directly with the host before booking.

q6.question: What about cancellations?
q6.answer: You negotiate cancellation conditions directly with the host. Each host has their own policy. This gives you flexibility to reach agreements that suit both parties.

q7.question: What if the host doesn't respond?
q7.answer: We guarantee host response within 48 hours. If they don't respond, we refund 100% of your payment. No questions asked.

q8.question: Is payment secure?
q8.answer: Yes. We use Stripe, the same system used by Airbnb, Uber and thousands of companies. Bank-level encryption. Your data is always protected.

madrid.malasana: Epicenter of Madrid's alternative and creative scene. Full of vintage cafés, modern coworkings, and vibrant nightlife. Ideal for creatives and digital nomads seeking inspiration at every corner. Excellent connectivity with metro and buses.
madrid.chamberi: Residential neighborhood with village soul in the heart of the city. Tranquil and sophisticated atmosphere, perfect for professionals who value calm without sacrificing centrality. Traditional markets, cozy terraces, and excellent transport connections.
madrid.salamanca: Madrid's most elegant neighborhood. Wide avenues, stately architecture, and premium atmosphere. Ideal for executives and senior professionals seeking an exclusive environment with all high-end services at hand.
madrid.chueca: Cosmopolitan and diverse heart of Madrid. Inclusive and vibrant atmosphere with endless international restaurants, unique boutiques, and very active social scene. Perfect for nomads who value cultural diversity.
madrid.lavapies: Madrid's most multicultural neighborhood. Authentic, alternative, and with more accessible prices. Great community of artists, international students, and entrepreneurs. Ideal for those seeking authenticity and diversity.
madrid.retiro: Life next to Madrid's green lung. Perfect balance between residential tranquility and proximity to the center. Ideal for athletes and nature lovers who need to disconnect without getting away from work.
madrid.centro: The historic and tourist epicenter. Maximum connectivity and 24/7 services. Vibrant and dynamic, perfect for those who want to be in the heart of everything, although with more hustle than other neighborhoods.
madrid.las-letras: Madrid's literary neighborhood, between Atocha and the Prado. Refined cultural atmosphere with bookstores, historic cafés, and museums. Ideal for writers, intellectuals, and creative professionals seeking historical inspiration.
madrid.huertas: Theater district, tapas bars, and cultural atmosphere. Very central with bohemian character. Perfect for those seeking nightlife without giving up traditional Madrid charm.
madrid.justicia: Between Malasaña and Chueca, combines the best of both. Modern but less touristy atmosphere. Ideal for young professionals seeking urban quality of life at more reasonable prices.
madrid.sol: Spain's kilometer zero. Maximum connectivity with all metro lines. Very touristy and lively area, ideal for short stays or those who need constant mobility throughout the city.
madrid.gran-via: Madrid's main artery. Theaters, shops, and 24/7 commercial life. Perfect for those who need to be ultra-connected and don't mind the more touristy atmosphere.
madrid.arguelles: University neighborhood with young and dynamic atmosphere. Well connected, with moderate prices and many cafés for working. Ideal for graduate students and young professionals.
madrid.moncloa: University area par excellence, next to the University City. Student atmosphere, accessible prices, and lots of young ambiance. Perfect for international students and young professionals.
madrid.tetuan: Neighborhood in transformation, multicultural and authentic. More economical than the center but very well connected. Ideal for nomads on a tight budget seeking local authenticity.
madrid.prosperidad: Quiet and well-connected residential neighborhood. Family atmosphere with all services. Perfect for professionals seeking tranquility and good prices without moving away from the center.

barcelona.gracia: The most bohemian and creative neighborhood. Plazas with terraces, local markets, and village atmosphere within the city. Ideal for artists, creatives, and nomads seeking authenticity and local community.
barcelona.eixample: Modernist design and cosmopolitan life. Wide avenues, Gaudí architecture, and sophisticated atmosphere. Perfect for professionals who value the balance between history, culture, and modernity.
barcelona.gotico: The medieval heart of Barcelona. Narrow streets full of history, hidden cafés, and magical atmosphere. Ideal for those seeking inspiration in history but can tolerate tourism.
barcelona.born: Perfect fusion between history and modernity. Art galleries, design boutiques, and innovative restaurants. Ideal for creatives and design professionals seeking a cosmopolitan atmosphere.
barcelona.raval: Barcelona's most multicultural and alternative neighborhood. Authentic, diverse, and with more accessible prices. Large artistic and international community. Perfect for nomads with open minds.
barcelona.poblenou: Barcelona's technology district. Former industrial spaces converted into coworkings and lofts. Near the beach with startup atmosphere. Ideal for entrepreneurs and tech workers.

valencia.ruzafa: Valencia's hipster neighborhood. Traditional market, modern cafés, and vibrant cultural life. Perfect for creatives and young professionals seeking balance between tradition and modernity.
valencia.el-carmen: Heart of the historic center with alternative soul. Medieval streets full of urban art, galleries, and charming cafés. Ideal for artists and bohemians seeking historical inspiration.
valencia.benimaclet: Former village with its own character. University atmosphere, accessible prices, and lots of local charm. Perfect for students and young professionals on a tight budget.
valencia.centro: Between the North Station and the central market. Maximum connectivity and services. Ideal for professionals who need constant mobility and quick access to the entire city.

sevilla.triana: Seville's neighborhood with the most duende. Across the Guadalquivir, famous for its flamenco tradition and ceramics. Authentic, lively, and perfectly connected. Ideal for those seeking the most genuine Sevillian essence.
sevilla.centro: Historic heart of Seville with the Cathedral and Alcázar. Monumental architecture, tourist atmosphere but with charming corners. Perfect for history lovers who need maximum centrality.
sevilla.nervion: Modern commercial and residential area. Excellent for shopping, near Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán Stadium. Well connected with all services. Ideal for professionals seeking comfort and modernity.
sevilla.macarena: Authentic and traditional neighborhood north of the center. Less touristy, with local markets and neighborhood atmosphere. More accessible prices. Perfect for those seeking genuine local life.

lisboa.baixa: The neoclassical heart of Lisbon. Monumental plazas, elegant shops, and maximum connectivity. Perfect for professionals who need to be at the center of everything and value historic architecture.
lisboa.chiado: The literary and cultural neighborhood. Historic bookstores, elegant cafés, and theaters. Sophisticated and bohemian atmosphere at once. Ideal for writers, editors, and creative professionals.
lisboa.alfama: Lisbon's oldest neighborhood. Steep streets, fado at every corner, and spectacular views. Authentic and full of character. Perfect for those seeking the most traditional essence of Lisbon.
lisboa.bairro-alto: Epicenter of nightlife and alternative scene. Quiet by day, vibrant by night. Art galleries, bars, and unique restaurants. Ideal for young nomads seeking social atmosphere.
lisboa.principe-real: Lisbon's trendy neighborhood. Beautiful gardens, design boutiques, and vibrant LGBTQ+ community. Sophisticated but relaxed. Perfect for creative professionals and tech entrepreneurs.

porto.ribeira: Porto's soul next to the Douro River. UNESCO Heritage with iconic views and tourist atmosphere. Traditional restaurants and lots of charm. Ideal for short stays seeking the essence of Porto.
porto.cedofeita: The artistic and design neighborhood. Galleries, vintage shops, and modern cafés. Creative and university atmosphere. Perfect for designers, artists, and creative sector professionals.
porto.boavista: Modern commercial area with the famous Rotunda. Well connected, with shopping centers and offices. Ideal for corporate professionals seeking comfort and modernity.
porto.foz: The neighborhood by the sea where the Douro meets the Atlantic. Waterfront promenade, relaxed and residential atmosphere. Perfect for those seeking tranquility without moving too far from the center.

ciudad-de-mexico.condesa: CDMX's hipster epicenter. Art deco, tree-lined parks, and the best café and restaurant scene. Large community of digital nomads and expats. Ideal for creatives and entrepreneurs seeking community.
ciudad-de-mexico.roma-norte: The artistic and cultural neighborhood. Galleries, independent boutiques, and innovative gastronomic movement. Bohemian and modern atmosphere. Perfect for artists, designers, and creative professionals.
ciudad-de-mexico.polanco: CDMX's Beverly Hills. Premium area with embassies, museums, and high-end restaurants. Safe, clean, and sophisticated. Ideal for executives and senior professionals seeking exclusivity.
ciudad-de-mexico.coyoacan: Colonial neighborhood with artistic soul, home to Frida Kahlo. Plazas with centenary trees, traditional markets, and cultural atmosphere. Perfect for those seeking authenticity and tranquility.
ciudad-de-mexico.santa-fe: Modern corporate area with skyscrapers and shopping centers. Far from the center but with all infrastructure. Ideal for corporate professionals who work in the area.

buenos-aires.palermo: Buenos Aires' most trendy neighborhood. Divided into Palermo Soho (design and fashion) and Palermo Hollywood (gastronomy and nightlife). Large digital nomad community. Ideal for creatives and entrepreneurs.
buenos-aires.recoleta: Parisian elegance in Buenos Aires. French architecture, art galleries, and the famous cemetery. Sophisticated and cultural. Perfect for professionals seeking refinement and culture.
buenos-aires.san-telmo: The bohemian and tango neighborhood. Antiques market, street art, and historic atmosphere. Authentic and full of character. Ideal for artists and those seeking the most genuine porteño essence.
buenos-aires.belgrano: Residential neighborhood to the north, with embassies and tranquil atmosphere. Less touristy but well connected. Perfect for families and professionals seeking residential quality of life.
buenos-aires.puerto-madero: Buenos Aires' modern waterfront. Contemporary lofts, riverside restaurants, and corporate atmosphere. Safe and modern. Ideal for executives and professionals seeking modernity.

medellin.el-poblado: Medellín's premium zone. Parque Lleras as epicenter, with international restaurants, coworkings, and large digital nomad community. Safe and modern. Ideal for remote workers seeking community.
medellin.laureles: Residential and cosmopolitan neighborhood. Quieter than El Poblado but equally well connected. Parks, stadium, and local life. Perfect for professionals seeking balance between work and tranquil life.
medellin.envigado: Adjacent municipality with more tranquil and traditional atmosphere. Beautiful parks and family life. More accessible prices. Ideal for those seeking quality of life at better prices.
medellin.sabaneta: The 'village' within the city. More economical, with traditional central park and genuine local atmosphere. Well connected by metro. Perfect for tight budgets seeking authenticity.

austin.mueller: Sustainable and planned urban development. New tech epicenter of Austin with proximity to Tesla Giga Texas. Parks, local markets, and green community. Ideal for tech professionals and families who value sustainability.
austin.zilker: Outdoor life next to Lady Bird Lake. Zilker Park, running trails, and active atmosphere. Perfect for athletes and nature lovers who work remotely. Proximity to downtown and authentic vibe.
austin.barton-hills: Tranquil residential neighborhood between Zilker and downtown. Local vibe, good schools, and houses with gardens. Ideal for families and professionals seeking quality of life without getting away from work.
austin.domain: Austin's 'second downtown'. Tech hub with Apple, Oracle, and Meta nearby. Shopping, restaurants, and corporate life. Perfect for tech employees seeking comfort and access to amenities.
austin.east-austin: Neighborhood in full gentrification, authentic and artistic. Music venues, food trucks, and creative community. More accessible prices with high appreciation potential. Ideal for millennials and creatives.
austin.tarrytown: Austin's most exclusive neighborhood. Stately homes, proximity to UT, and premium stability. Ideal for executives, university professors, and doctors seeking exclusivity and tradition.

miami.brickell: Miami's financial core with modern high-rises, premium dining, and fast access to downtown. Ideal for remote professionals who want an upscale urban environment.
miami.wynwood: Creative district known for street art, galleries, and startup energy. Great for creatives and founders who value inspiration, networking, and international vibe.
miami.miami-beach: Coastal lifestyle with beach access, wellness, and premium leisure. Perfect for medium-term stays focused on quality of life and sunshine.
miami.downtown: Miami's urban center with strong connectivity, services, and fast transport links. Great for professionals who need mobility and central access.
miami.edgewater: Modern residential bayfront area with skyline views and a calmer rhythm than downtown. Attractive for remote workers seeking city-life balance.
miami.coconut-grove: Green and bohemian neighborhood with tree-lined streets, marinas, and relaxed pace. Ideal for families and professionals wanting tranquility near the city core.

footer.tagline: Your perfect home for remote work. Remote-work ready accommodations in the best cities.

termsPage.metadataDescription: Terms and conditions for using the InhabitMe platform for medium-term stays.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to InhabitMe. By creating an account or using our platform, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.body: Accessing and using InhabitMe implies full acceptance of these terms. If you do not accept them, you may not use the platform. InhabitMe reserves the right to update these terms at any time, with at least 15 days' notice by email.

sections.title: 2. Description of service
sections.body: InhabitMe is a platform connecting property owners or managers (hosts) with people looking for medium-term stays (1–12 months). InhabitMe acts as a technology intermediary and is not a party to the rental contract between host and guest. The rental agreement is established directly between both parties.

sections.title: 3. Registration and user account
points: Be at least 18 years old and have legal capacity to enter contracts.
Provide truthful, complete and up-to-date information.
Keep your login credentials confidential.
Notify us immediately of any unauthorised access to your account.
Not create more than one account per person or company.

sections.title: 4. Fees and payments
sections.body: InhabitMe charges a one-time fee to guests when confirming a booking. This fee covers access to host contact details and the booking process. Fees vary by stay duration:
points: 1 month: €79 / guest
2–3 months: €139 / guest
4–6 months: €189 / guest
7+ months: €239 / guest

sections.title: 5. Cancellation and refund policy
sections.body: Once the platform fee has been paid and contact details exchanged, the charge is non-refundable, as the intermediation service has been delivered. If you experience a technical issue preventing completion of the process, contact support@inhabitme.com within 48 hours of payment.

sections.title: 6. Host obligations
points: Publish accurate information: current photos, precise descriptions, real availability and correct pricing.
Respond to guest enquiries within a reasonable time (recommended: 48 hours).
Comply with local rental regulations applicable to their property.
Not request off-platform payments to circumvent platform fees.

sections.title: 7. Guest obligations
points: Provide truthful information when requesting a booking.
Respect the conditions of the accommodation agreed with the host.
Not misrepresent their financial situation or identity.
Pay rent directly to the host as agreed.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of liability
sections.body: InhabitMe is not liable for: fulfilment of rental contracts between hosts and guests, property damage, unpaid rent, discrepancies between a listing's description and reality, or disputes between users. InhabitMe's role is limited to facilitating contact between parties.

termsPage.contactBody: If you have questions about these terms, write to us at legal@inhabitme.com. We respond within 5 business days.

cookiesPage.metadataDescription: Learn how inhabitme uses cookies and how you can control them.
cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: inhabitme uses cookies to improve your experience. This policy explains what they are, how we use them, and how to control them.
cookiesPage.whatAreBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.
cookiesPage.manageBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies may affect functionality.

privacyPage.metadataDescription: How InhabitMe collects, uses and protects your personal data under GDPR.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At InhabitMe we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it and what rights you have, in compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.body: InhabitMe is the controller of your personal data. Contact us at privacy@inhabitme.com for any privacy-related questions.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.body: We collect the following data depending on how you use the platform:
points: Account data: name, email and profile photo provided on registration (via Clerk).
Property data: title, description, images, location and features of listings published by hosts.
Booking data: messages, stay dates and preferences provided when requesting a booking.
Payment data: securely processed by Stripe. InhabitMe does not store card numbers or bank details.
Usage data: pages visited, searches and performance metrics, collected anonymously.

sections.title: 3. Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data for the following purposes:
points: Service delivery (legal basis: contract): managing your account, processing bookings and facilitating communication between hosts and guests.
Payments (legal basis: contract): processing platform fee payments.
Service communications (legal basis: legitimate interest): notifying you about bookings, enquiries and platform updates.
Product improvement (legal basis: legitimate interest): analysing aggregated, anonymised usage to improve the experience.
Legal compliance (legal basis: legal obligation): retaining records as required by applicable law.

sections.title: 4. Data sharing
sections.body: InhabitMe does not sell or transfer your personal data to third parties for commercial purposes. We only share data in the following cases:
points: Service providers: Clerk (auth), Stripe (payments), Supabase (database), Cloudinary (image storage) and Resend (email) — all acting as processors under data protection agreements.
Between users: when a booking is confirmed, hosts and guests receive each other's contact details to coordinate the stay.
Legal obligation: when required by competent authorities under applicable law.

sections.title: 5. Data retention
sections.body: We retain your data for as long as necessary to fulfil the stated purposes. As a general rule: account data is deleted within 30 days of account closure; transaction records are kept for 5 years for tax obligations; booking messages are kept for 2 years.

sections.title: 6. Your rights (GDPR)
sections.body: As a European user you have the following rights, which you can exercise by writing to privacy@inhabitme.com:
points: Access: request a copy of all data we hold about you.
Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Erasure: request deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
Portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
Objection and restriction: object to processing based on legitimate interest or ask us to restrict it.
Withdrawal of consent: where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time.

sections.title: 7. Security
sections.body: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures: in-transit encryption (HTTPS/TLS), access controls, secure authentication and incident monitoring. No system is 100% secure; in the event of a breach affecting your rights, we will notify you within the timeframes required by GDPR.

privacyPage.contactBody: You can exercise your rights or resolve any queries by writing to our privacy team. We respond within 30 days.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about inhabitme

q1.a: inhabitme is a platform specialized in medium-term stays (1-6 months) for remote workers and digital nomads. We connect hosts with verified spaces to guests looking for quality accommodation with fast WiFi and proper workspaces.

q2.q: How is it different from Airbnb or Booking?
q2.a: We focus on medium-term stays (not short nights). We verify WiFi, offer transparent pricing without surprises, and charge a one-time fee ($79-239) based on stay duration, not monthly commissions.

q3.a: We currently have properties in Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Málaga, Lisbon and other major cities in Spain and Portugal. We're constantly expanding to new locations.

g1.q: How does the booking process work?
g1.a: 1) Search and find your ideal accommodation. 2) Submit a booking request with your dates. 3) The host reviews and approves. 4) You pay securely. 5) You receive access details before arrival.

g2.a: We charge a one-time service fee based on duration: $79 (1-2 months), $139 (3-4 months), or $239 (5-6 months). No monthly commissions, no hidden costs.

g3.a: All accommodations include verified WiFi (minimum 50 Mbps), workspace, and basic amenities. Some include extras like cleaning, coworking, or gym. Check each listing for details.

g4.a: Yes. Cancellation policy depends on each host. Typically: free cancellation up to 30 days before, 50% refund up to 14 days before, no refund afterward. Check specific policy before booking.

h1.q: How much does inhabitme charge hosts?
h1.a: We charge hosts 3% of the total booking value, significantly lower than platforms charging 15-20%. You receive payment 24 hours after guest check-in.

h2.q: How can I publish my property?
h2.a: 1) Create a free account. 2) Complete the property details form. 3) Upload quality photos. 4) Verify your WiFi. 5) We publish your listing within 24-48 hours after review.

h3.q: What requirements must my property meet?
h3.a: Minimum requirements: verified WiFi >50 Mbps, dedicated workspace, minimum 1-month availability, quality photos, complete description, and competitive pricing.

h4.a: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. You receive your payout (minus 3% commission) 24 hours after guest check-in. Funds go directly to your bank account.

p1.q: Is it safe to pay through inhabitme?
p1.a: Absolutely. All payments are processed via Stripe, one of the world's most secure processors. We never store your credit card information.

p2.a: We accept major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), and SEPA bank transfers for longer stays.

p3.q: What if there's a problem with the property?
p3.a: If the property doesn't match what's promised, contact us immediately. Our support team will mediate and resolve issues. In serious cases, we offer refunds or relocation.

cta.title: Can't find your answer?
cta.subtitle: Our team is here to help. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

about.metadataDescription: Learn the story behind inhabitme and our mission to connect digital nomads with ideal medium-term stays.
about.missionText: Make finding the perfect home for remote work simple, transparent, and reliable.
about.problemText: Digital nomads and remote workers face a unique challenge: they need medium-term housing (1-6 months) with reliable WiFi and proper workspaces. Traditional platforms weren't designed for this.
about.wifiText: All listings include confirmed internet quality, crucial for remote work.
about.midStaysText: Focused on 1-12 months, the sweet spot for digital nomads.
about.communityText: We connect hosts who understand remote workers' needs.
about.noSurprisesText: Honest descriptions, real photos, and direct communication.
about.howStep1Text: listings filtered by city, price, and WiFi
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your next home?
about.ctaSubtitle: Thousands of verified listings are waiting in top cities for digital nomads.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Do you have any questions? We're here to help. We'll reply as soon as possible.
contact.sendMessageDescription: Complete the form and we'll get back to you

dashboard.changeContactStep1: Use the button "+ Add email address" or "+ Add phone number"
dashboard.changeContactStep2: Verify the new contact (you'll receive a code)

hero.subtitle: List your property for free. Pay a flat fee only when you confirm a tenant. No monthly cuts on your rent.
